title: The Bangladesh Shilpa Rin Sangstha Order, 1972 (President's Order)
title_en: The Bangladesh Shilpa Rin Sangstha Order, 1972 (President's Order)
description: WHEREAS it is expedient to establish a Sangstha to provide credit facilities and other assistance to industrial concerns and encourage and broaden the base of investment in Bangladesh and to provide for the vesting in the Sangstha of the undertakings of the Pakistan Industrial Credit and Investment Corporation Limited, the Investment Corporation of Bangladesh and the National Investment Trust Limited in Bangladesh...

provisions.title: 1. [Omitted]
provisions.content: 18. [Omitted by section 11 of the Bangladesh Shilpa Rin Sangstha (Amendment) Act, 1987 (Act No. XIX of 1987).]

provisions.title: 2. [Omitted]
provisions.content: 32A. [Omitted by section 9 of the Bangladesh Shilpa Rin Sangstha (Amendment) Act, 1993 (Act No. IV of 1993).]
